# Beraterium — English site (en.beraterium.de)

> Risk management and business consulting for startups, SMBs and solo self-employed — enterprise methods made accessible.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://en.beraterium.de/): Enterprise risk management for mid-market businesses
- [Services](https://en.beraterium.de/services/): Risk checks for startups, SMBs and solo
- [Method](https://en.beraterium.de/method/): 3-level hazard catalogue, euro-based risk assessment
- [About](https://en.beraterium.de/about/): Why Beraterium exists
- [Team](https://en.beraterium.de/team/): Founders and experts
- [Risk Radar](https://en.beraterium.de/risk-radar/): Expert network for implementation
- [Blog](https://en.beraterium.de/blog/): Practical risk management insights
- [Contact](https://en.beraterium.de/contact/): Free 30-minute intro call

## German site

The authoritative German site is at [beraterium.de](https://www.beraterium.de/).

## Contact

- Email: kontakt@beraterium.de
